---
title: "Assignment 1"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

```{r}
library(sf)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggthemes)
```
```{r}
#nhoods <- st_read("https://bostonopendata-boston.opendata.arcgis.com/datasets/3525b0ee6e6b427f9aab5d0a1d0a1a28_0.kml?outSR=%7B%22latestWkid%22%3A2249%2C%22wkid%22%3A102686%7D", quiet=TRUE)
water <- st_read("https://gis.cambridgema.gov/download/gdb/BOUNDARY_CDDNeighborhoods.gdb.zip", quiet=TRUE)
#parking <- st_read("", quiet=TRUE)
#trees <- st_read("", quiet=TRUE)
```

```{r}
ggplot(water) +
  geom_sf(fill="lightblue", color=NA) +
  geom_sf(data=trees, color = "darkgreen", size = 0.01) +
  geom_sf(data=nhoods, fill = NA, color = "gray")
```
